title: ENDDOCUMENT
text: ENDDOCUMENT End the XML document, closing all open tags. ENDDOCUMENT() Return Values Values returned: 0 Success. –1 Failure. Called in an illegal sequence. Description This operation ensures that all open elements and the document itself are properly closed. It performs implicit ENDELEMENT calls, if necessary, to end all elements that were not ended yet. Call this operation when there are no more elements or comments to add to the XML document. It can legally be called only after invoking STARTELEMENT , CHARACTERS , ENDELEMENT , or DOCCOMMENT . After calling ENDDOCUMENT , only the GETDOCUMENT operation is available; all the others will give return the value –1 without changing the document any further. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
